title: Genesis_Medicine: AI-driven Korean herbal natural-product drug discovery pipeline for skin disease
description: Open-source computational pipeline integrating Boltz-2 / Chai-1 cofold + ADMET-AI + OpenMM 8 ABFE + Round-5 SOTA adapters (Boltz-ABFE, MolDAIS BoTorch SAASBO, AToM-OpenMM, AIMNet2, CarsiDock-Cov, PBK Dermal HT, SARA-ICE OECD TG 497-III, Skin Fibroblast Atlas, CellAwareGNN). Targets skin scar regeneration, hyperpigmentation, alopecia, acne, photoaging across 13 Korean medicinal herbs and 102+ phytochemicals. Methodology paper-tier T4L99A·benzene calibration to 1.17 kcal/mol of literature ITC. EMB-3 lead from Embelia ribes scaffold-hop with hERG 0.40→0.16 improvement.

creators.name: HanCheongWoo
creators.affiliation: Genesis_Medicine Lab, Seoul; HAN PREDICT, Inc.; Recover Korean Medicine Clinic
